title: Report information about the local bioregion
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Report information about the local bioregion demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to work

pcs.text: Confirm geographic area and work requirements for bioregion report with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm geographic area and work requirements for bioregion report with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm geographic area and work requirements for bioregion report with supervisor.

pcs.text: Identify, select and prepare materials and resources required to perform the work
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify, select and prepare materials and resources required to perform the work?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify, select and prepare materials and resources required to perform the work.

pcs.text: Identify sources of information and literature to support bioregion report
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify sources of information and literature to support bioregion report?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify sources of information and literature to support bioregion report.

pcs.text: Identify and engage community for local bioregion information
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and engage community for local bioregion information?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and engage community for local bioregion information.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to work

elements.title: Collect information

pcs.text: Determine the boundaries and extent of bioregion according to community, geography and biological information

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the boundaries and extent of bioregion according to community, geography and biological information.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify vernacular names of key plant and animal species of ecosystem.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify key features and sites within the bioregion and relationship to ecosystem.

pcs.text: Investigate plant and animal relationships and possible impact on community or permaculture system
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate plant and animal relationships and possible impact on community or permaculture system?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate plant and animal relationships and possible impact on community or permaculture system.

pcs.text: Investigate current land use and land management practices in bioregion

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate current land use and land management practices in bioregion.

pcs.text: Identify historical land use within the bioregion
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify historical land use within the bioregion?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify historical land use within the bioregion.

pcs.text: Identify and document simple food chains and energy flows relevant to local bioregion
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and document simple food chains and energy flows relevant to local bioregion?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and document simple food chains and energy flows relevant to local bioregion.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Collect information

elements.title: Review changes

pcs.text: Identify key environmental changes from historical land use and potential impact on current and future land use

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify key environmental changes from historical land use and potential impact on current and future land use.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Summarise environmental trends and their potential impacts on the bioregion.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify land and water use practices that can mitigate or repair environmental change.
